perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark hair and fair skin is leaning forward on a white table or surface. She is wearing an oversized white button-down shirt that is partially open, looking directly at the camera with a soft expression. (2) As the video progresses, she shifts her posture slightly, revealing a pink lace bra underneath the shirt. She maintains eye contact with a gentle smile and subtle head tilts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo pop song begins immediately. (2) A female vocal is heard singing English lyrics ("...picture in my wallet like you... take a look at my girlfriend..."). The audio is clear and studio-quality without any background noise or sound effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text appears at the bottom center: "幫我看一下 哪張照片 相親成功率比較高" (Help me see which photo has a higher success rate for blind dating). The tone is interactive and seeking opinion.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The subject poses and shifts her clothing to reveal more detail while looking at the camera.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator posing in front of the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long straight black hair, wearing a white unbuttoned shirt and a pink lace bra.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a plain, neutral-colored wall and a white table surface in the foreground.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Soft, bright studio lighting that highlights the subject's skin.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the creator's physical appearance and engage the audience through a question about dating success. The combination of flirtatious visual cues and interactive text aims to generate comments and likes.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct eye contact and interactive questioning text.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form social media beauty content designed for engagement using a 'dating success' hook.
